arts.ttl: Esse's move from Millwall to Palace edges closer
arts.sum: Millwall winger Romain Esse's move to Crystal Palace is edging closer, according to Lions boss Alex Neil.

arts.ttl: 'Extraordinary' Forest similar to Leicester's title winners
arts.sum: The Monday Night Club discuss Nottingham Forest's Premier League challenge as they face Liverpool in a "big test" for Arne Slot's side.

arts.ttl: How to watch & follow Palace at Leicester LIVE
arts.sum: Crystal Palace will be hoping to extend our unbeaten run against Leicester City on Wednesday, January 15 (KO: 19:30 GMT) – here's how you can watch and follow the action LIVE!

arts.ttl: Transfer news and rumours today: Wout Faes to leave Leicester, Romain Esse to Crystal Palace, Diego Carlos to Fenerbahce
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up the latest transfer news and rumours, including Woet Faes leaving Leicester City, Romain Esse to Crystal Palace and Diego Carlos to Fenerbahce.

arts.ttl: Sammy Braybrooke plan confirmed by Ruud van Nistelrooy as rules prevent Leicester City decision
arts.sum: Young Leicester City midfielder Sammy Braybrooke has been recalled from his loan spell at Dundee and is set to spend the remainder of the season under Ruud van Nistelrooy’s watch. On his first loan spell away from the club, Braybrooke played just eight matches with Dundee, with his 12-minute cameo against Rangers last week coming after a run of eight games as an unused substitute.

arts.ttl: Premier League: Predictions for all ten of this midweek's games
arts.sum: Alex Jack has picked out a score prediction for all 10 Premier League matches taking place on Tuesday, Wednesday and Thursday.

After five straight Premier League defeats, Ruud van Nistelrooy's Leicester got back to winning ways with a 6-2 victory over QPR in the FA Cup at the weekend. Crystal Palace also secured their place ...

arts.ttl: BREAKING: First Premier League club at risk of PSR points deduction discover fate as results confirmed
arts.sum: Premier League strugglers Leicester City are among the clubs who have been waiting to hear whether or not they would face a potential points deduction over PSR issues

arts.ttl: Leicester City transfer takes step closer after incoming signing's social media post
arts.sum: Incoming Leicester City signing Woyo Coulibaly has bid farewell to Parma as he prepares to move to the King Power Stadium. Coulibaly, who can also play at left-back, has spent the past three-and-a-half years at Parma since being signed by Enzo Maresca from Le Havre in his native France.

arts.ttl: £15m player now left out of squad as manager admits Crystal Palace move is advanced
